name: Polish Sausage & Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice onions and arrange them at the bottom of a Dutch oven.
2. Slice potatoes and layer them on top of the onions.
3. Add water, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Cover and place the pot on coals until the water starts to simmer.
5. Cut cabbage into wedges.
6. When the water is simmering, add the cabbage wedges and sausage back into the pot.
7. Return to heat and simmer until potatoes are tender and cabbage is cooked through.
